next_steps: Open https://<ct-ip>:8080 in a browser (use the CT IP address, not a domain, per AIO HSTS guidance).
Complete the AIO setup wizard (domain, admin account, optional apps).
For nginx-waf exposure, enable nextcloud.aio.reverse_proxy in config and follow https://github.com/nextcloud/all-in-one/blob/main/reverse-proxy.md
Stack updates after first setup are managed in the AIO UI; hdc maintain refreshes the mastercontainer image only.
